info.label: Theme
info.value: This config starts on 'ocean'. Press T anywhere to cycle: dark, light, ocean, forest, matrix, high-contrast, synthwave.

info.label: Marker
info.value: The ▶ on the selected row can be turned off in Settings (highlight by color only).

info.label: Saved
info.value: Your theme and marker choice persist in ~/.menuki/settings.json across runs.

items.name: Open Settings
items.description: Cycle the theme and toggle the selection marker, with a live preview.

items.name: A sample command
items.description: Just so there is something to run while you try themes.
